description: Re-establishes coherence when cultural, institutional, or informational fields drift into collective delusion. Works in tandem with delusion detection algorithms to restore grounded sense through reciprocity, feedback, and humor.

personal: Laugh at contradiction before fixing it.
Reconnect with sensory reality (touch, breathe, move).
relational: Ask, ‘Who benefits if this stays confusing?’
Reintroduce feedback from those affected by decisions.
Switch from argument to curiosity mode.
systemic: Shorten loop length between consequence and decision.

thresholds.sense_coherence_index < 0.4: Delusional drift detected – initiate full reality audit.
thresholds.index > 0.7: Field coherent – monitor humor flux for stability.
